payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Partial interior window with a white painted frame and closed horizontal slatted (plastic) blinds, right edge of the frame visible and the crop is cut off at top and bottom; exterior building shapes are visible diffusely through the blinds; slight blur/overexposure suggests the window is approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"right-edge white window with blinds","long_description":"Partial interior window with a white painted frame and closed horizontal slatted (plastic) blinds, right edge of the frame visible and the crop is cut off at top and bottom; exterior building shapes are visible diffusely through the blinds; slight blur/overexposure suggests the window is approximately 1.2 m from the camera.","attributes":["white painted frame","horizontal slatted blinds","plastic blinds","partially cropped top and bottom","right-edge visible","visible blind cords","diffuse exterior through slats","slightly blurred/overexposed"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
